# VibeToLive.dev

> VibeToLive.dev turns AI-generated prototypes and vibe-coded apps into secure, scalable, production-ready software for founders, indie hackers, and lean teams.

VibeToLive.dev helps teams that used tools like Lovable, V0, Bolt, Cursor, Replit, ChatGPT, Claude, Windsurf, and Base44 but now need production hardening, security cleanup, deployment, observability, and maintenance.

Core offers:
- Vibe to Live: fixed-scope production hardening and deployment for AI-generated prototypes.
- Add Some Spice: scoped feature, performance, and technical debt work.
- Keep It Alive: ongoing production maintenance, dependency updates, monitoring, and small fixes.

## Core Pages
- [Homepage](https://www.vibetolive.dev): AI prototype to production service overview.
- [Services](https://www.vibetolive.dev/services): Production hardening, secure deployment, scaling, and maintenance services.
- [Case Studies](https://www.vibetolive.dev/case-studies): Examples of AI prototypes moved toward production readiness.
- [Blog](https://www.vibetolive.dev/blog): Articles and updates about AI-generated apps, production readiness, and deployment.

## Production Guides
- [AI Prototype to Production](https://www.vibetolive.dev/ai-prototype-to-production): Main guide and service hub for turning AI prototypes into production-ready apps.
- [Lovable to Production](https://www.vibetolive.dev/from-lovable-to-production): How to prepare Lovable-built apps for production.
- [V0 to Production](https://www.vibetolive.dev/from-v0-to-production): How to take V0-generated apps beyond UI prototypes.
- [Bolt to Production](https://www.vibetolive.dev/from-bolt-to-production): How to move Bolt-built apps from sandbox to production infrastructure.
- [Cursor to Production](https://www.vibetolive.dev/from-cursor-to-production): How to review and ship Cursor-built applications safely.
- [Replit to Production](https://www.vibetolive.dev/from-replit-to-production): How to harden Replit apps for real users.
- [ChatGPT to Production](https://www.vibetolive.dev/from-chatgpt-to-production): How to turn ChatGPT-generated code into maintainable production software.
- [Claude to Production](https://www.vibetolive.dev/from-claude-to-production): How to review and deploy Claude-generated applications.
- [Windsurf to Production](https://www.vibetolive.dev/from-windsurf-to-production): How to move Windsurf-built apps into production.
- [Base44 to Production](https://www.vibetolive.dev/from-base44-to-production): How to make Base44 prototypes production-ready.

## Reference Guides
- [Production Readiness Checklist](https://www.vibetolive.dev/production-readiness-checklist): Practical checklist for launch readiness.
- [Security Risks in AI-Generated Code](https://www.vibetolive.dev/security-risks-ai-generated-code): Common security risks in AI-built applications.
- [Why AI Prototypes Break in Production](https://www.vibetolive.dev/why-ai-prototypes-break-in-production): Failure modes that appear after real users arrive.
- [Should You Rewrite AI Code?](https://www.vibetolive.dev/should-you-rewrite-ai-code): Decision guide for refactor, repair, or rewrite.
- [Monitoring for AI Apps](https://www.vibetolive.dev/monitoring-for-ai-apps): Observability and maintenance guidance for AI-built applications.

## Optional
- [Sitemap](https://www.vibetolive.dev/sitemap.xml): Complete canonical URL list for search engines.
- [Robots](https://www.vibetolive.dev/robots.txt): Search crawler access policy.
